description: Fully-contiguous BOSS CMASS-South: every interior hole inpainted with the data-driven non-Gaussian field; only the outer boundary remains.
note: Contiguous catalog(seed) = draw(base_package, seed) + contiguous/inpaint_seed_*.npz. Pair with cmass_south_randoms_contiguous.npz. PROV=5 inpaint carries an 'uncert' prior-dominance flag; down-weight uncert>=0.5 for conservative use.
